description: Golden dataset for the AI exposure backfill into the FutureProof Engine. Each chain traces from consumable.ai_exposure source scores through the LEFT JOIN on soc_code to expected backfilled values in program_career_paths and career_branches. All values queried from actual Iceberg parquet files on 2026-04-09 and cross-validated against consumable.ai_exposure.

verification_chains.name: ISU Business Admin -> Sales Managers (stat_res backfill from Karpathy)

pre_backfill_state.note: Before backfill, stat_res and boss_ai_score were NULL placeholders

derivation_steps.stat_res: LEFT JOIN ai_exposure ON soc_code = '11-2022' -> stat_res = 4 (passthrough from ai_exposure)
derivation_steps.boss_ai_score: LEFT JOIN ai_exposure ON soc_code = '11-2022' -> boss_ai_score = 7 (passthrough from ai_exposure)
derivation_steps.stats_available_count: COUNT(non-null in [stat_ern=5, stat_roi=8, stat_res=4, stat_grw=6, stat_hmn=7]) = 5 (was 4 before backfill)
derivation_steps.bosses_available_count: COUNT(non-null in [boss_ai=7, boss_loans=3, boss_market=7, boss_burnout=6, boss_ceiling=2]) = 5 (was 4 before backfill)

verification_chains.verified_against: consumable.ai_exposure parquet (soc_code=11-2022) and consumable.program_career_paths parquet (backfilled snapshot)

verification_chains.name: UAB Communication -> Fundraising Managers (independent cross-validation)

pre_backfill_state.note: Before backfill, AI fields were NULL

derivation_steps.stat_res: LEFT JOIN ai_exposure ON soc_code = '11-2033' -> stat_res = 4 (passthrough from ai_exposure)
derivation_steps.boss_ai_score: LEFT JOIN ai_exposure ON soc_code = '11-2033' -> boss_ai_score = 7 (passthrough from ai_exposure)
derivation_steps.stats_available_count: COUNT(non-null in [stat_ern=6, stat_roi=8, stat_res=4, stat_grw=6, stat_hmn=5]) = 5
derivation_steps.bosses_available_count: COUNT(non-null in [boss_ai=7, boss_loans=3, boss_market=6, boss_burnout=6, boss_ceiling=2]) = 5

verification_chains.verified_against: consumable.ai_exposure parquet (soc_code=11-2033) and consumable.program_career_paths parquet (backfilled snapshot)

verification_chains.name: Career branch: Marketing Managers -> Sales Managers (res_delta and ai_boss_delta)

derivation_steps.source_res: LEFT JOIN ai_exposure ON soc_code = '11-2021' -> stat_res = 3
derivation_steps.source_ai_boss: LEFT JOIN ai_exposure ON soc_code = '11-2021' -> boss_ai_score = 8
derivation_steps.related_res: LEFT JOIN ai_exposure ON related_soc_code = '11-2022' -> stat_res = 4
derivation_steps.related_ai_boss: LEFT JOIN ai_exposure ON related_soc_code = '11-2022' -> boss_ai_score = 7
derivation_steps.ai_boss_delta: related_ai_boss - source_ai_boss = 7 - 8 = -1 (target faces WEAKER AI boss)

verification_chains.verified_against: consumable.ai_exposure parquet (soc_codes 11-2021 and 11-2022) and consumable.career_branches backfilled parquet
